# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 1
  SECURE_LOG_LEVEL: "info"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

.mr_info_secure:
  before_script:
    - |
      # Sanitize MR title and description to prevent injection attacks
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        export MR_TITLE_SAFE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]._-' | cut -c1-100)
      else
        export MR_TITLE_SAFE="Direct commit"
      fi
      
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        export MR_DESC_SAFE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | tr -cd '[:alnum:][:space:]._-' | head -c 500)
      else
        export MR_DESC_SAFE="No description"
      fi
      
      # Create safe tag name (alphanumeric, dots, hyphens only)
      export DEPLOY_TAG=$(echo "deploy-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${MR_TITLE_SAFE}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr -cd '[:alnum:].-' | cut -c1-63)
      
      # Create safe version for notifications
      export BUILD_VERSION="${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      
      # Sanitize branch name
      export BRANCH_SAFE=$(echo "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" | tr -cd '[:alnum:]._-' | cut -c1-50)

validate_mr_info:
  stage: validate
  extends: .mr_info_secure
  script:
    - echo "Validating merge request information..."
    - |
      # Validate that sanitized values are not empty
      if [ -z "$MR_TITLE_SAFE" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: MR title sanitization resulted in empty string"
        exit 1
      fi
      
      if [ -z "$DEPLOY_TAG" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Deploy tag generation failed"
        exit 1
      fi
      
      # Validate tag format (DNS label format for Kubernetes compatibility)
      if ! echo "$DEPLOY_TAG" | grep -qE '^[a-z0-9]([-a-z0-9]*[a-z0-9])?$'; then
        echo "ERROR: Invalid deploy tag format: $DEPLOY_TAG"
        exit 1
      fi
      
      echo "MR Title (sanitized): $MR_TITLE_SAFE"
      echo "Deploy Tag: $DEPLOY_TAG"
      echo "Branch: $BRANCH_SAFE"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
    paths:
      - build.env
    expire_in: 1 hour
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

build_application:
  stage: build
  extends: .mr_info_secure
  image: docker:24-dind
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - |
      # Create build metadata file with sanitized content
      cat > build-metadata.json <<EOF
      {
        "commit": "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}",
        "branch": "${BRANCH_SAFE}",
        "mr_title": "${MR_TITLE_SAFE}",
        "build_time": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
        "pipeline_id": "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
      }
      EOF
    
    - cat build-metadata.json
    
    # Build with safe labels
    - |
      docker build \
        --label "commit=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" \
        --label "branch=${BRANCH_SAFE}" \
        --label "mr-title=${MR_TITLE_SAFE}" \
        --label "pipeline-id=${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" \
        --tag "myapp:${BUILD_VERSION}" \
        --file Dockerfile \
        .
    
    - docker save "myapp:${BUILD_VERSION}" -o app-image.tar
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-metadata.json
      - app-image.tar
    expire_in: 1 day
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

test_application:
  stage: test
  extends: .mr_info_secure
  image: docker:24-dind
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - docker load -i app-image.tar
    - echo "Running tests for MR: $MR_TITLE_SAFE"
    - docker run --rm "myapp:${BUILD_VERSION}" /bin/sh -c "echo 'Running tests...'"
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  extends: .mr_info_secure
  image: bitnami/kubectl:latest
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - |
      # Create Kubernetes deployment with safe labels
      cat > deployment.yaml <<EOF
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: myapp-staging
        labels:
          app: myapp
          environment: staging
          commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
          pipeline: "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
        annotations:
          deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
          app.gitlab.com/commit: "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
          app.gitlab.com/branch: "${BRANCH_SAFE}"
      spec:
        replicas: 2
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: myapp
            environment: staging
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: myapp
              environment: staging
              version: ${BUILD_VERSION}
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: myapp
              image: myapp:${BUILD_VERSION}
              env:
              - name: DEPLOY_VERSION
                value: "${BUILD_VERSION}"
              - name: DEPLOY_BRANCH
                value: "${BRANCH_SAFE}"
      EOF
    
    - cat deployment.yaml
    - echo "Deployment configuration created with tag: $DEPLOY_TAG"
    
    # Create release notes artifact
    - |
      cat > release-notes.txt <<EOF
      Release: ${BUILD_VERSION}
      Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}
      Branch: ${BRANCH_SAFE}
      Feature: ${MR_TITLE_SAFE}
      Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}
      Deployed: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
      
      Description:
      ${MR_DESC_SAFE}
      EOF
    
    - cat release-notes.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment.yaml
      - release-notes.txt
    expire_in: 30 days
  environment:
    name: staging
    deployment_tier: staging
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  extends: .mr_info_secure
  image: bitnami/kubectl:latest
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - |
      # Create production deployment with safe labels
      cat > deployment-prod.yaml <<EOF
      apiVersion: apps/v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: myapp-production
        labels:
          app: myapp
          environment: production
          commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
          pipeline: "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
        annotations:
          deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
          app.gitlab.com/commit: "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
          app.gitlab.com/branch: "${BRANCH_SAFE}"
      spec:
        replicas: 3
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: myapp
            environment: production
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: myapp
              environment: production
              version: ${BUILD_VERSION}
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: myapp
              image: myapp:${BUILD_VERSION}
              env:
              - name: DEPLOY_VERSION
                value: "${BUILD_VERSION}"
              - name: DEPLOY_BRANCH
                value: "${BRANCH_SAFE}"
      EOF
    
    - cat deployment-prod.yaml
    
    # Create Git tag with sanitized name
    - |
      git config user.email "ci@gitlab.com"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
      git tag -a "${DEPLOY_TAG}" -m "Production deployment: ${MR_TITLE_SAFE}" || true
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment-prod.yaml
    expire_in: 90 days
  environment:
    name: production
    deployment_tier: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual

notify_slack:
  stage: notify
  extends: .mr_info_secure
  image: curlimages/curl:latest
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - |
      # Create JSON payload with properly escaped content
      PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Deployment Notification",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Deployment Complete*"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Version:*\n${BUILD_VERSION}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Branch:*\n${BRANCH_SAFE}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Feature:*\n${MR_TITLE_SAFE}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Tag:*\n${DEPLOY_TAG}"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
    
    - echo "$PAYLOAD" > notification.json
    - cat notification.json
    
    # Send notification (uncomment when SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is configured)
    # - 'curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d @notification.json "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL"'
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - notification.json
    expire_in: 7 days
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
  allow_failure: true

generate_release_notes:
  stage: notify
  extends: .mr_info_secure
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
    - |
      # Generate comprehensive release notes
      cat > RELEASE_NOTES.md <<EOF
      # Release Notes
      
      ## Version: ${BUILD_VERSION}
      
      **Deployment Tag:** \`${DEPLOY_TAG}\`
      
      **Branch:** ${BRANCH_SAFE}
      
      **Feature:** ${MR_TITLE_SAFE}
      
      **Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      
      **Pipeline:** ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
      
      **Date:** $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)
      
      ## Description
      
      ${MR_DESC_SAFE}
      
      ## Changes
      
      - Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      - Author: ${GITLAB_USER_NAME:-Unknown}
      - Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}
      
      EOF
    
    - cat RELEASE_NOTES.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - RELEASE_NOTES.md
    expire_in: 1 year
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
